input_text: Pehal la artis tu buat muka kesian kat IG, padahal hidup mewah gila. Menyampah tengok muka dia.
reason: Rude personal commentary targeting a celebrity's appearance and perceived hypocrisy. Dismissive and mocking tone.
suggested_rewrite: Artis tu nampak hidup mewah tapi buat muka kesian kat IG. Rasa tak konsisten.

input_text: Gila ke apa influencer ni, badan macam tu pun nak promote gym wear. Malu sikit la.
reason: Body-shaming commentary directed at an influencer. Rude and dismissive of their right to promote products.
suggested_rewrite: Influencer ni promote gym wear tapi tak nampak convincing. Patut tunjuk hasil workout dulu.

input_text: University quota system memang tak adil la. Orang lain score tinggi pun tak dapat masuk sebab bukan golongan tertentu.
reason: Expresses resentment about university racial quotas with implied communal undertone. Borderline but not hateful.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem kemasukan universiti perlu dikaji semula supaya lebih adil berdasarkan merit.

input_text: Habis la macam ni, anak aku straight A pun tak dapat biasiswa. Yang result biasa-biasa tu dapat pulak. Sistem apa ni?
reason: Scholarship allocation resentment with implied ethnic bias. Rude tone expressing cynicism about the system.
suggested_rewrite: Anak saya straight A tapi tak dapat biasiswa. Harap sistem biasiswa boleh lebih telus dan berasaskan merit.

input_text: Cari rumah sewa memang susah kalau bukan kaum tertentu. Owner terus reject bila tahu nama kita.
reason: Expresses frustration about ethnic discrimination in rentals. Uses vague communal language implying bias.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah diskriminasi dalam penyewaan rumah perlu ditangani. Semua orang patut dapat layanan adil.

input_text: Pemandu jenis ni memang la, potong queue, tak signal, lepas tu horn orang lain. Dasar tak bertamadun.
reason: Uses 'jenis ni' (this type) as a vague group reference when blaming bad driving. Calls them uncivilized.
suggested_rewrite: Pemandu yang potong queue dan tak signal memang bahaya. Perlu penguatkuasaan undang-undang lebih ketat.

input_text: Pehal la bising sangat malam-malam. Nak sambut festival pun ada had la. Orang lain nak tidur juga.
reason: Rude complaint about festival noise with implied communal targeting. Dismissive of cultural celebration.
suggested_rewrite: Bunyi bising semasa festival pada waktu malam agak mengganggu. Harap boleh kawal bunyi selepas jam tertentu.

input_text: Government tender semua kroni dapat la. Kita rakyat biasa mana ada chance. Semua dah kena sapu.
reason: Cynical accusation that all government tenders go to cronies. Unverified sweeping claim about corruption.
suggested_rewrite: Proses tender kerajaan perlu lebih telus untuk memastikan peluang yang adil bagi semua pihak.

input_text: Calon PRU ni cakap je lebih. Janji macam-macam tapi lepas menang lupa rakyat. Penipu semua.
reason: Aggressively calls all election candidates liars. Rude and dismissive of the entire political process.
suggested_rewrite: Calon PRU banyak berjanji tapi sering tidak menunaikan. Rakyat perlu menilai calon berdasarkan rekod prestasi.

input_text: Artis ni kalau tak ada surgery mana la cantik macam tu. Semua fake. Promote natural beauty konon.
reason: Accuses a celebrity of plastic surgery without evidence. Rude dismissal and body-related rumor-spreading.
suggested_rewrite: Ada yang mempersoalkan keaslian penampilan artis ini. Promosi kecantikan semula jadi perlu konsisten dengan amalan.

input_text: Menyampah tengok influencer ni berlagak pandai. Degree pun takde tapi nak ajar orang pasal bisnes.
reason: Dismissive attack on influencer's qualifications. Rude and elitist tone gatekeeping business advice.
suggested_rewrite: Influencer ni bagi nasihat bisnes tapi tak jelas kelayakan dia. Pastikan sumber nasihat anda boleh dipercayai.

input_text: Quota masuk U ni memang buat orang panas hati. Kawan aku 9A pun kena tolak. Yang 5A masuk senang je. Explain la macam mana.
reason: Resentment about university admission quotas with implied ethnic context. Rude and demanding tone.
suggested_rewrite: Kawan saya 9A tapi tak dapat masuk U. Sistem kemasukan perlu lebih telus supaya semua faham kriteria.

input_text: Tuan rumah I ni memang suka buli penyewa. Sebab kita bukan bangsa dia, deposit pun nak charge lebih.
reason: Accuses landlord of ethnic discrimination in rental deposit. Rude with communal undertone.
suggested_rewrite: Tuan rumah saya mengenakan deposit lebih tinggi yang mungkin bersifat diskriminatif. Ini perlu ditangani secara adil.

input_text: Jenis pemandu yang langgar traffic light tu memang dari kawasan sana la. Sana memang tak reti ikut rules.
reason: Stereotypes drivers from a vaguely referenced area as rule-breakers. Rude generalization about an entire community.
suggested_rewrite: Pemandu yang langgar lampu isyarat membahayakan semua. Penguatkuasaan perlu diperkuatkan di kawasan ini.

input_text: Deepavali fireworks sampai pukul 3 pagi. Esok orang nak kerja la. Ingat dunia ni korang punya ke?
reason: Rude complaint about Deepavali celebrations with communal undertone. 'Korang' targets the celebrating community.
suggested_rewrite: Bunga api semasa Deepavali sampai lewat malam agak mengganggu. Harap dapat kawal waktu untuk keselesaan semua.

input_text: Hari Raya korban bau busuk satu taman. Tak boleh ke buat kat tempat lain? Menyampah betul.
reason: Rude complaint about Hari Raya Korban rituals. Dismissive of religious practice with 'menyampah' (disgusted).
suggested_rewrite: Bau semasa korban di kawasan perumahan agak mengganggu. Mungkin boleh dibuat di kawasan khas.

input_text: Tender kerajaan dah la tak telus. Yang dapat projek pun syarikat Ali Baba je. Rakyat kena tipu je la.
reason: Uses 'Ali Baba company' reference cynically about government tenders. Unverified sweeping accusation of fraud.
suggested_rewrite: Proses tender kerajaan perlu lebih telus. Isu syarikat Ali Baba perlu disiasat untuk memastikan integriti.

input_text: Hospital kerajaan ni memang nak test kesabaran orang. Tunggu 6 jam, jumpa doktor 5 minit. Baik tak payah datang.
reason: Rude criticism of government hospital wait times. Dismissive of healthcare system with exaggerated frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Masa menunggu di hospital kerajaan terlalu lama berbanding masa bersama doktor. Sistem perlu diperbaiki.

input_text: Nurse kat klinik tu memang muka masam je 24/7. Kita tanya soalan pun macam kita mengganggu dia. Tak guna punya service.
reason: Rude personal attack on nursing staff. Calls the service useless and mocks staff attitude.
suggested_rewrite: Layanan di klinik kurang mesra. Jururawat sepatutnya lebih peramah dan responsif kepada pesakit.

input_text: Tak guna punya YB. Longkang depan rumah pun tak settle tapi nak jadi menteri konon.
reason: Calls elected representative useless and mocks their ambition. Rude but reflects genuine constituent frustration.
suggested_rewrite: YB kawasan ini belum selesaikan isu asas seperti longkang. Perlu buktikan prestasi sebelum jawatan lebih tinggi.

input_text: Influencer drama hari-hari. Satu buat hal, semua nak viral. Content sampah tapi followers berjuta. Malaysia memang la.
reason: Rudely dismisses influencer culture and generalizes about Malaysian audiences. Calls content 'sampah' (trash).
suggested_rewrite: Drama influencer kerap menjadi viral. Pengguna media sosial perlu lebih kritikal dalam memilih kandungan yang berkualiti.

input_text: Celeb tu baru kahwin dah bercerai. Relationship macam tukar baju. Patut la jadi role model kan.
reason: Sarcastically mocks a celebrity's failed marriage. Rude personal commentary on private life.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan selebriti ini tidak bertahan lama. Isu peribadi sepatutnya tidak dijadikan bahan gosip.

input_text: Kolej swasta punya fees mahal gila tapi kualiti macam tadika. Lecturer pun macam baru lepas grad.
reason: Rudely compares private college quality to kindergarten and insults lecturers. Exaggerated frustrated criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Yuran kolej swasta tinggi tapi kualiti pengajaran tidak setaraf. Perlu peningkatan kualiti tenaga pengajar.

input_text: Orang kawasan tu memang drive macam jalan bapak dia punya. Tak heran la selalu accident.
reason: Stereotypes drivers from a certain area with rude language. 'Jalan bapak dia' is a dismissive Malaysian expression.
suggested_rewrite: Kawasan ini kerap berlaku kemalangan. Langkah keselamatan jalan raya perlu ditingkatkan.

input_text: Klinik kesihatan ni staff semua macam robot. Tak senyum, tak tolong, tapi kalau nak break time mesti on time.
reason: Rudely compares clinic staff to robots and accuses them of being lazy. Dismissive and frustrated.
suggested_rewrite: Layanan di klinik kesihatan kurang mesra. Staf perlu lebih prihatin dan membantu pesakit.

input_text: Bilik sewa RM800 tapi condition macam kandang. Landlord tak nak repair sebab kita tenant asing katanya.
reason: Describes poor rental conditions and implies landlord neglects repairs because of tenant's background. Communal undertone.
suggested_rewrite: Bilik sewa RM800 tapi keadaan tidak memuaskan dan tuan rumah enggan buat pembaikan. Hak penyewa perlu dilindungi.

input_text: Owner rumah sewa ni kalau kaum dia sendiri, murah je sewa. Kita kena bayar double. Ini fair ke?
reason: Accuses a landlord of charging different rent based on ethnicity. Communal resentment with rhetorical rude tone.
suggested_rewrite: Sewa rumah sepatutnya sama untuk semua tanpa mengira latar belakang. Diskriminasi harga perlu ditangani.

input_text: Motor dari kampung tu memang la ride macam samseng. Signal tak guna, helmet pun takde. Lepas tu salahkan kereta.
reason: Stereotypes rural motorcyclists as gangsters and rule-breakers. Rude generalization about an entire group.
suggested_rewrite: Sesetengah penunggang motosikal tidak mematuhi peraturan jalan raya. Penguatkuasaan dan kesedaran perlu ditingkatkan.

input_text: Maulud Nabi punya perarakan sampai malam. Boleh tak buat waktu siang je? Kita semua nak rehat juga.
reason: Rude complaint about Maulud Nabi procession timing. Dismissive of Islamic celebration.
suggested_rewrite: Perarakan Maulud Nabi berlangsung hingga malam. Cadangan supaya tamat lebih awal demi keselesaan penduduk.

input_text: Semua contract highway toll pergi kat orang yang sama je. Monopoli berselindung di sebalik tender terbuka.
reason: Accuses highway toll contracts of being monopolistic under the guise of open tenders. Sweeping unverified claim.
suggested_rewrite: Kontrak highway toll dilihat kurang kompetitif. Proses tender perlu lebih terbuka dan telus.

input_text: Projek kerajaan siap lambat 2 tahun tapi kos naik 3 kali ganda. Duit rakyat hilang ke poket siapa tu?
reason: Cynical accusation about government project cost overruns implying corruption. Unverified insinuation.
suggested_rewrite: Projek kerajaan yang siap lambat dan melebihi bajet perlu disiasat. Ketelusan kos projek amat penting.

input_text: Selebriti tu baru kena tangkap pun dah boleh keluar. Kalau orang biasa, confirm kena lokap lama. Double standard.
reason: Claims celebrity gets preferential legal treatment without evidence. Cynical accusation of double standards.
suggested_rewrite: Ada persepsi bahawa selebriti mendapat layanan istimewa dalam sistem perundangan. Undang-undang perlu adil untuk semua.

input_text: SPM result bagus pun tak guna kalau masuk U kena tengok benda lain selain result. Frust gila anak aku.
reason: Implies university admission considers factors beyond results (coded ethnic quota reference). Frustrated parent's perspective.
suggested_rewrite: Anak saya keputusan SPM cemerlang tapi masih sukar masuk universiti. Sistem perlu lebih telus dan adil.

input_text: Nak masuk MRSM pun susah kalau bukan bumiputera. System ni buat untuk siapa sebenarnya?
reason: Questions MRSM admission restrictions for non-bumiputera students. Borderline communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Akses pendidikan seperti MRSM perlu dikaji semula supaya lebih inklusif untuk semua rakyat Malaysia.

input_text: Scholarship untuk orang tertentu je. Anak kita straight A tapi dapat pinjaman. Anak orang tu B je dah dapat biasiswa penuh. Adil?
reason: Compares scholarship outcomes with ethnic undertone. 'Orang tertentu' and 'anak orang tu' are coded communal references.
suggested_rewrite: Pengagihan biasiswa perlu lebih telus dan berasaskan merit supaya semua pelajar cemerlang mendapat peluang yang sama.

input_text: This influencer ah, face like that also dare to sell skincare. Scam la basically.
reason: Rude personal commentary mocking an influencer's appearance to discredit their product. Dismissive and demeaning tone.
suggested_rewrite: This influencer promoting skincare doesn't seem credible. The product might not be effective.

input_text: These drivers from that area ah, really don't know how to drive one. Every day got accident because of them.
reason: Blames road accidents on drivers from a vaguely referenced area, implying a group stereotype. Rude generalization.
suggested_rewrite: There are frequent accidents in that area. Road safety measures and driver education should be improved.

input_text: Festival time mesti la jalan kena block. Every year same thing. Why other people kena suffer because of their celebration?
reason: Rude complaint about festival road closures with communal undertone separating 'their' celebration from the rest.
suggested_rewrite: Festival road closures cause inconvenience. Better planning and advance notice would help everyone.

input_text: So fed up with this hospital la. Wait 5 hours then the nurse still want to give attitude. What kind of service is this?
reason: Frustrated rant about healthcare wait times directed rudely at nursing staff. Emotional but not threatening.
suggested_rewrite: Waited 5 hours at the hospital and the service was disappointing. Healthcare staffing and wait times need improvement.

input_text: This politician only knows how to talk during campaign. After win, disappear like ghost. Useless la.
reason: Calls a politician useless with aggressive campaign-time criticism. Rude but within political frustration.
suggested_rewrite: This politician is very visible during campaigns but less active after winning. Accountability is needed year-round.

input_text: Every time look for room to rent, they see your name then suddenly 'sorry room taken already'. Yeah right la.
reason: Implies ethnic discrimination in rental market based on name. Sarcastic and resentful tone.
suggested_rewrite: I've experienced what seems like name-based discrimination when looking for rentals. This issue needs to be addressed.

input_text: The doctor at this clinic barely looked at me la. 2 minute consultation for 4 hour wait. What a joke.
reason: Dismissive criticism of a doctor's consultation quality. Rude and frustrated tone calling it a joke.
suggested_rewrite: The consultation was very brief after a long wait. The clinic should improve consultation quality and reduce wait times.

input_text: University intake ni bukan based on merit dah. Based on what colour your IC la basically. Everyone knows this.
reason: IC colour reference is a coded ethnic reference in Malaysia. Expresses resentment about perceived racial quotas.
suggested_rewrite: University admissions should be based on merit. A more transparent system would benefit all students.

input_text: That area all the landlord same one. They only rent to their own kind. Others they charge more or straight reject.
reason: Stereotypes all landlords in an area as ethnically discriminatory. Generalizes an entire group's behavior.
suggested_rewrite: Rental discrimination in some areas is a serious concern. Landlords should offer equal terms to all potential tenants.

input_text: That housing area drivers confirm one kind. Morning already speeding through school zone. Accident waiting to happen.
reason: Stereotypes drivers from a specific housing area as reckless. Rude generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Speeding through school zones in that area is dangerous. Traffic enforcement should be increased there.

input_text: CNY lion dance every morning 7am. Some of us not celebrating la bro. Can have some consideration or not?
reason: Rude complaint about CNY celebrations separating 'us' from 'them'. Dismissive of cultural celebration.
suggested_rewrite: The early morning lion dance during CNY can be disruptive. Some scheduling consideration would be appreciated.

input_text: Hungry Ghost Festival burn stuff until the whole street bau asap. Health hazard la this. Nobody say anything?
reason: Rude complaint about Hungry Ghost Festival practices as a health hazard. Dismissive of Chinese cultural practice.
suggested_rewrite: Open burning during the Hungry Ghost Festival affects air quality. Designated areas for burning would be a good solution.

input_text: Government hospital wait time is a joke la. Old people sitting there for hours. Nobody cares. The system is broken.
reason: Calls hospital wait time a joke and says nobody cares. Rude emotional criticism of healthcare system.
suggested_rewrite: Government hospital wait times are too long, especially for elderly patients. The system needs significant improvement.

input_text: That singer on Anugerah Juara Lagu, voice like that also can win? Sure got backing one la.
reason: Insults a singer's voice quality and implies they won through connections without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: The AJL winner's performance was controversial. Some feel other contestants were more deserving.

input_text: Private college is just a money-making machine la. Quality terrible but fees keep going up. Lecturers also half-past-six.
reason: Rudely dismisses private colleges and insults lecturers as incompetent using Malaysian slang 'half-past-six'.
suggested_rewrite: Private college fees keep increasing but quality isn't matching up. Better regulation of standards is needed.

input_text: Chinese New Year firecrackers until 2am every night for one week. My kids cannot sleep. Is this acceptable?
reason: Frustrated complaint about CNY firecrackers affecting children's sleep. Borderline communal targeting of celebration.
suggested_rewrite: Late-night firecrackers during Chinese New Year disrupt children's sleep. Reasonable time limits would help everyone.

input_text: Wesak Day procession block the whole main road. Cannot even go to work. Every year same problem nobody solve.
reason: Rude complaint about Wesak Day road closures. Dismissive of Buddhist celebration with frustrated tone.
suggested_rewrite: Wesak Day processions cause road closures that affect commuters. Better traffic management would help reduce inconvenience.

input_text: This GLC contract always go to the same connected people. Regular business owners like us got no chance at all.
reason: Accuses GLC contracts of going to connected insiders. Cynical unverified claim about favoritism.
suggested_rewrite: GLC contract allocation should be more transparent so that all qualified businesses have a fair opportunity.

input_text: Emergency department nurses act like we are disturbing them. We are the patients la, show some empathy can or not?
reason: Rude complaint about ER nurses' attitude. Demands empathy in an aggressive, frustrated tone.
suggested_rewrite: Emergency department staff should be more empathetic toward patients. Better working conditions may help improve attitudes.

input_text: Local council election candidates only show face at pasar malam. Rest of the year, invisible. What a scam.
reason: Calls election candidates' behavior a scam for only appearing at markets. Rude political criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Local council candidates should engage with constituents year-round, not just during election season.

input_text: 那个网红连话都讲不清楚，还敢上节目丢人现眼，真的看不下去。
reason: Rude personal attack on a celebrity's speaking ability. Dismissive and mocking tone in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 那个网红在节目上的表达能力有待提升，表现不够理想。

input_text: 每次大学录取都是那样的，成绩好的进不了，成绩差的靠什么进的大家都知道。
reason: Insinuates ethnic-based university admissions bias with cynical tone. Implies communal favoritism without naming group directly.
suggested_rewrite: 大学录取制度应该更加透明和公平，以成绩为主要标准。

input_text: 这种网红只会卖弄身材，脑子里什么都没有，还那么多人追。马来西亚人真的没水准。
reason: Insults influencer for relying on appearance, then generalizes that Malaysians have no standards. Rude and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: 这类网红的内容缺乏深度。希望大家能支持更有内涵的创作者。

input_text: 房东一看我名字就说房间租出去了，第二天还在网上打广告。这不是种族歧视是什么？
reason: Describes a discriminatory rental experience based on name/ethnicity. Accusatory but based on frustrating personal experience.
suggested_rewrite: 房东拒绝我后仍在网上招租，这种做法令人怀疑是否存在歧视。应该有更公平的租房制度。

input_text: 那边的人开车真的很恐怖，红灯当绿灯，转弯不打灯，出了事还怪别人。
reason: Stereotypes 'people from that area' as terrible drivers. Rude generalization without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: 该地区的交通违规情况比较严重，需要加强执法和交通安全教育。

input_text: 每次过节就封路，为什么他们庆祝我们要受苦？这样公平吗？
reason: Complains about festival road closures with clear us-vs-them framing. Rude and dismissive of other community's celebrations.
suggested_rewrite: 节日封路造成不便，希望有关当局能提前通知并做好交通安排。

input_text: 政府的合同都是给同一批人的，普通人哪有机会？这个国家真的没希望了。
reason: Cynical claim that government contracts always go to the same people. Unverified and nihilistic tone.
suggested_rewrite: 政府合同的分配需要更透明和公平，让更多人有机会参与竞标。

input_text: 去政府医院看病等了一整天，护士还态度那么差。纳税人的钱都花到哪里去了？
reason: Complains about long hospital wait and rude nurses in Chinese. Questions government spending with frustration.
suggested_rewrite: 政府医院等待时间过长，服务态度有待改善。医疗资源应该得到更好的分配。

input_text: 选举的时候才来跟我们华人讲华语，平时问他问题理都不理。这种人也配当YB？
reason: Accuses a politician of pandering to Chinese community only during elections. Rude with communal framing.
suggested_rewrite: 政治人物应该全年都关注各族群的需求，而不是只在选举时才来拉票。

input_text: 大学固打制真的太不公平了。我们华人的孩子再努力也没用，位子都被分完了。
reason: Explicitly frames university quota resentment along ethnic lines. Expresses communal frustration but not hate.
suggested_rewrite: 大学录取制度需要更公平透明，让所有学生都能凭实力获得机会。

input_text: 我朋友成绩那么好都进不了本地大学，结果要去私立的花几万块。这个制度对我们公平吗？
reason: Chinese-language frustration about local university admission perceived as unfair to a certain ethnic group. Communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: 我朋友成绩优秀却无法进入本地大学，需要上昂贵的私立学校。入学制度需要更公平。

input_text: 那个歌手的演唱会票那么贵，唱得又难听。有钱打广告没钱练歌是吗？
reason: Insults a singer's vocal ability and suggests they spend on promotion rather than practice. Rude critique.
suggested_rewrite: 这位歌手的演唱会票价偏高，但现场表现未达预期。希望能提升演出质量。

input_text: 大学录取看的不是成绩而是肤色，这样的制度怎么能培养出人才？
reason: Explicitly claims university admission is based on skin color. Strong communal resentment about quota system.
suggested_rewrite: 大学录取制度应该以学术成绩为主要标准，确保公平竞争和人才培养。

input_text: 这家医院的护士态度真差，问个问题好像欠她钱似的。taxpayer的钱白花了。
reason: Rudely criticizes a nurse's attitude using a common Chinese expression. Questions taxpayer money spent on service.
suggested_rewrite: 这家医院的护士服务态度需要改善。患者有权获得友善和专业的医疗服务。

input_text: இந்த பிரபலம் என்ன தகுதி இருக்கு பேசுறதுக்கு? சினிமாவிலே நடிக்க வந்ததே யாரோ recommend பண்ணதால.
reason: Questions a celebrity's qualifications rudely and spreads unverified claim about how they got their career.
suggested_rewrite: இந்த பிரபலத்தின் தகுதி குறித்து கேள்விகள் உள்ளன. திறமை அடிப்படையிலான வாய்ப்புகள் முக்கியம்.

input_text: வாடகை வீடு தேடுறது எவ்வளவு கஷ்டம் தெரியுமா? பேரை சொன்னாலே reject பண்ணிடுறாங்க.
reason: Tamil complaint about rental discrimination based on name. Expresses ethnic resentment in frustrated tone.
suggested_rewrite: வாடகை வீடு தேடும்போது பெயரின் அடிப்படையில் நிராகரிக்கப்படுவது நியாயமற்றது. இதை தீர்க்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: அந்த பகுதி drivers எல்லாரும் ஒரே மாதிரி தான். Signal போடாம, lane cut பண்ணுவாங்க, accident ஆனா நம்ம mistake-ன்னு சொல்வாங்க.
reason: Tamil stereotyping of drivers from a specific area as universally bad. Rude generalization.
suggested_rewrite: அந்த பகுதியில் போக்குவரத்து விதிமீறல்கள் அதிகம். சிறந்த சாலை பாதுகாப்பு நடவடிக்கைகள் தேவை.

input_text: பண்டிகை நேரத்திலே ஏன் ரோடு block பண்ணுறாங்க? நாங்க வேலைக்கு போகணும் இல்லையா?
reason: Rude frustration about festival road closures in Tamil. Implies that others' celebrations obstruct daily life.
suggested_rewrite: பண்டிகை நேரத்தில் சாலை மூடல் தொழிலாளர்களுக்கு சிரமம் தருகிறது. சிறந்த போக்குவரத்து ஏற்பாடு தேவை.

input_text: அரசாங்க மருத்துவமனையில 6 மணி நேரம் காத்திருந்தேன். Doctor 2 நிமிடம் பார்த்துட்டு அனுப்பிட்டாரு. இது என்ன service?
reason: Tamil frustration about long hospital wait and short consultation. Rude dismissal of service quality.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்க மருத்துவமனையில் நீண்ட காத்திருப்பு நேரத்திற்கு பிறகு மிகக் குறுகிய ஆலோசனை நேரம் கிடைத்தது. சிகிச்சை முறை மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த அரசியல்வாதி தேர்தல் நேரத்தில மட்டும் கோவிலுக்கு வருவாரு. வெட்கம் இல்லையா?
reason: Accuses a politician of visiting temples only during elections. Tamil critique with communal undertone and rude tone.
suggested_rewrite: அரசியல்வாதிகள் தேர்தல் நேரத்தில் மட்டும் கோவிலுக்கு வருவது உண்மையான அக்கறையா என்ற கேள்வி எழுகிறது.

input_text: இந்த landlord நம்ம Tamil-ன்னு தெரிஞ்சதும் rent RM200 கூட்டிட்டாரு. இது என்ன நியாயம்?
reason: Tamil complaint about landlord increasing rent upon learning tenant's ethnicity. Communal discrimination claim.
suggested_rewrite: வாடகை நிர்ணயத்தில் இன அடிப்படையிலான பாகுபாடு ஏற்றுக்கொள்ள முடியாதது. சட்ட ரீதியான பாதுகாப்பு தேவை.

input_text: இந்த college fees-க்கு ஏத்தமாதிரி quality இல்லை. Lecturer-க்கு qualification இருக்கான்னே doubt-ஆ இருக்கு.
reason: Tamil complaint about college quality-to-fee ratio, questioning lecturers' qualifications rudely.
suggested_rewrite: கல்லூரி கட்டணத்திற்கு ஏற்ற தரமான கல்வி வழங்கப்படவில்லை. ஆசிரியர்களின் தகுதி உறுதி செய்யப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: அரசாங்க ஒப்பந்தம் எல்லாம் ஒரே கும்பலுக்கு தான் போகுது. சாதாரண மக்களுக்கு என்ன chance இருக்கு?
reason: Tamil accusation that government contracts go to the same group. Cynical and unverified sweeping claim.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்க ஒப்பந்தங்கள் வெளிப்படையாகவும் நியாயமாகவும் வழங்கப்பட வேண்டும். அனைவருக்கும் சம வாய்ப்பு தேவை.

input_text: Cannot tahan already la this uni system. My friend 4.0 GPA also cannot get in but some people with lower marks senang je masuk.
reason: Frustration about university admissions with implied ethnic quota resentment. Uses vague 'some people' as a communal reference.
suggested_rewrite: The university admissions system should prioritise merit to ensure fairness for all students.

input_text: Landlord I memang racist la. Every time I nak rent, dia tanya race dulu baru tanya salary. Geram betul.
reason: Describes a discriminatory rental experience with rude frustration. Labels landlord as racist based on personal experience.
suggested_rewrite: My landlord asked about my race before my salary when I applied to rent. This feels discriminatory and should be addressed.

input_text: I dah fed up la bro with this kerajaan punya nonsense. Cakap nak tolong rakyat tapi poket sendiri yang penuh.
reason: Mixed-language rant accusing government of enriching themselves. Cynical unverified accusation with rude tone.
suggested_rewrite: Saya kecewa dengan kerajaan. Rakyat mengharapkan ketelusan dan kebertanggungjawaban yang lebih baik.

input_text: Accident kat highway tu confirm la sebab orang yang baru dapat lesen drive macam gila. These new drivers are a menace la.
reason: Rudely blames all new drivers for highway accidents. Aggressive generalization calling them a menace.
suggested_rewrite: Highway accidents may involve inexperienced drivers. Better training and probationary measures could help improve safety.

input_text: Government contract semua orang sama je dapat. We all know which 'orang' la. Don't play dumb.
reason: Implies government contracts go to a specific ethnic group using coded language. Cynical and communally charged.
suggested_rewrite: Government contract allocation needs more transparency and open competition to ensure fairness.

input_text: This YouTuber thinks she's so great la. Makeup tutorial also need to act like she invented makeup. Cringe gila.
reason: Rude personal attack on a YouTuber's content style. Mocking and dismissive tone.
suggested_rewrite: This YouTuber's presentation style comes across as overly self-important. Content could be more relatable.

input_text: Thaipusam procession block jalan satu hari. Orang nak pergi kerja macam mana? Think about others la sikit.
reason: Rude complaint about Thaipusam procession blocking roads. Dismissive of Hindu religious practice.
suggested_rewrite: Thaipusam processions cause road closures. Better traffic management and advance notice would help everyone plan around it.

input_text: Motorcycle riders in KL got death wish is it? Red light also they belasah je. No wonder accident rate so high.
reason: Rudely claims all KL motorcyclists have a death wish. Aggressive generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Many motorcyclists in KL run red lights, contributing to high accident rates. Better enforcement is needed.

input_text: Thaipusam bunyik drum satu malam sampai pagi. Esok Monday la bro. Ada orang nak kerja.
reason: Rude complaint about Thaipusam drum noise before a work day. Dismissive of religious celebration.
suggested_rewrite: Thaipusam drum music goes late into the night before a workday. A reasonable cutoff time would help residents.

input_text: Doctor specialist appointment kena tunggu 6 bulan. By that time dah mati la bro. Healthcare system failing us.
reason: Exaggerated rude claim about dying while waiting for specialist appointment. Emotionally charged healthcare criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Specialist appointments take up to 6 months. The healthcare system needs more specialists to reduce dangerous wait times.

input_text: This candidate pandai cakap je. Ask about cost of living, he talk about national pride. Bodoh ke apa ni.
reason: Calls a candidate stupid for deflecting economic questions. Rude personal attack during political criticism.
suggested_rewrite: This candidate deflected questions about cost of living. Voters deserve direct answers on economic issues.

input_text: STPM students always get sidelined for matrikulasi students. We study harder but they get priority. System ni memang unfair.
reason: STPM vs matrikulasi is a coded ethnic education debate. Implies unfairness along communal lines.
suggested_rewrite: STPM and matrikulasi students should have equal opportunities for university entry. The dual-pathway system needs review.

input_text: Raya puasa punya bazaar block parking lot semua. Kita nak parking kat mana? Tak ada consideration langsung.
reason: Rude complaint about Ramadan bazaar taking parking spaces. Implies lack of consideration from the celebrating community.
suggested_rewrite: Ramadan bazaars sometimes take up existing parking. Alternative parking arrangements should be provided.

input_text: Ceramah political party tu bising gila sampai midnight kat taman perumahan. Esok kerja la weh, have some respect.
reason: Rude complaint about late-night political campaign noise in residential area. Aggressive but legitimate frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Political ceramahs in residential areas should end at a reasonable hour out of respect for residents.

input_text: The whole road construction tender given to company with no experience. Sure someone's relative la this.
reason: Accuses road construction tender of nepotism. Unverified insinuation about family connections in procurement.
suggested_rewrite: A road construction tender was awarded to an inexperienced company. The procurement process should be reviewed for transparency.

input_text: Clinic receptionist act like she's doing us a favour by registering us. So rude until I want to complain already.
reason: Rude complaint about clinic receptionist's attitude. Frustrated and dismissive of service quality.
suggested_rewrite: The clinic receptionist's attitude was unwelcoming. Service training for front desk staff would improve patient experience.

input_text: Opposition party only knows how to make noise in Parliament. Ask them to do real work, cannot one.
reason: Dismisses opposition as noisemakers incapable of real work. Rude generalization about all opposition members.
suggested_rewrite: The opposition should focus on constructive contributions in Parliament rather than just criticism.

input_text: These celebrity marriages are just for show la. Get married for publicity, divorce for more publicity. Shameless.
reason: Calls celebrity marriages shameless publicity stunts. Unverified accusation with rude, dismissive judgment of private lives.
suggested_rewrite: Celebrity marriages that end quickly raise questions about whether they are genuine. Public figures deserve some privacy.

input_text: Room for rent ad says 'preferred certain race only'. In 2026 still got this kind of discrimination. Disgusting.
reason: Rude reaction to racially discriminatory rental listing. Strong language ('disgusting') but directed at the discriminatory practice.
suggested_rewrite: Rental listings that specify racial preferences are discriminatory. Anti-discrimination measures in housing are needed.

input_text: 九皇爷庆典的时候整条街都是烟，呼吸都困难。为什么没人管这些事？
reason: Complains about Nine Emperor Gods Festival smoke as a health issue. Dismissive of religious practice.
suggested_rewrite: 九皇爷庆典期间烟雾较大，影响空气质量。建议设置指定焚烧区域以减少影响。

input_text: என் பிள்ளை நல்ல marks வாங்கியும் university-ல seat கிடைக்கல. இந்த system யாருக்காக இருக்கு?
reason: Tamil parent frustrated that child's good grades did not secure a university seat. Implied ethnic quota resentment.
suggested_rewrite: என் பிள்ளை நல்ல மதிப்பெண் பெற்றும் பல்கலைக்கழகத்தில் இடம் கிடைக்கவில்லை. சேர்க்கை முறை மேலும் நியாயமாக இருக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Grab driver bawak kereta macam F1 racer tapi skill macam baru belajar. Passenger punya safety langsung tak kisah.
reason: Insults a Grab driver's skills while accusing them of recklessness. Rude comparison and dismissal of passenger safety.
suggested_rewrite: Some Grab drivers drive too fast for passenger comfort. Safety should be a priority in ride-hailing services.
